cargo_toml:
[package]
name = "util"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[[bin]]
name = "util"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"
users = "0.11"
tempfile = "3"
deps_rationale: The implementation uses libc for POSIX uid/gid/chroot/close-from operations, users for passwd/group database lookups, and tempfile for sudoedit scratch files. It implements common option parsing, command execution, sudoedit basics, user/group switching when permitted, and validation such as rejecting malformed --preserve-env names; full sudoers policy, PAM authentication, plugins, SELinux, ACL/xattr, pty logging, and sparse/network-specific behavior are intentionally skipped.
